svg.title: Cache t default sourced-map overlay
svg.desc: Cache t default teaching overlay. Show three lanes early: A Main, B Main, and Mid. Take Mid with support so Highway or Vent can split the weaker site. Five players: A Main entry: A Main → Forklift; B Main entry: B Main → Checkers; Mid pressure: Garage → Mid; Highway / Vent: split after Mid; Bomb / flex: join the better read. The sourced overview remains the map layer; annotations are editorial and not pixel-perfect.
svg.text: Show three lanes early: A Main, B Main, and Mid. Take Mid with support so Highway or Vent can split the weaker site.

g.text: Sourced overview: https://www.csgold.net/en/maps/cache · local annotations are a teaching overlay, not a replacement radar.
